name: HPV45_LCR_URR_origin
description: HPV45 long control region (LCR), also called the upstream regulatory region (URR), ~750-1000 bp of non-coding DNA between L1 and E6 containing the origin of replication (ori), the early promoter p97/p105 (type-dependent), four E2-binding sites (E2BS1-4), an E1-binding site overlapping ori, and binding sites for host transcription factors (AP-1, NF1, Oct-1, YY1, glucocorticoid receptor). The ori spans an A/T-rich auxiliary element and an E1-binding palindrome around which E1 hexamerizes during replication initiation. Sequence variation within the LCR drives type-specific tropism and oncogenic potential and is the primary anchor for type-specific qPCR design.
expected_copy_count: 1 per episomal genome; intact LCR retained in many integrated forms
